name: CODING.net
description: Tencents DevOps SaaS (CODING) with Git hosting, CI/CD, project management and artifact repo.

seo.title: CODING.net — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: CODING.net: Tencents DevOps SaaS (CODING) with Git hosting, CI/CD, project management and artifact repo.

when_to_use: Tencent-hosted DevOps SaaS with Git and CI/CD
Artifact registry for Docker images and Maven packages
Project management boards linked to code commits

pros: Full DevOps suite: repo, CI, artifacts, PM in one
Strong performance and presence inside China
Free tier is generous for small teams
cons: Access and latency outside China are inconsistent
English docs and UI lag Chinese versions
Data residency is a concern for Western teams
review.verdict: A reasonable all-in-one DevOps platform if you operate in China or on Tencent Cloud.
review.best_for: Teams building for the Chinese market or hosted on Tencent Cloud.
review.not_for: Western teams needing global latency and mature English support.
